## What Changed And Why

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read `CONTRIBUTING.md`, including the "Licensing Of Contributions" section.
- [ ] No real internal project, module, or platform identifier is named in any example — placeholders only (`Alpha`, `Beta`, `Project X`, etc.).
- [ ] If I changed a `Methodology/sections/*.md` file, it still satisfies `Templates/section-contract.md` and `Templates/section-dod.md`.
- [ ] If I added or changed a `Derivatives/` document, I updated `Derivatives/README.md`, `Derivatives/derivatives-manifest.md`, and `Derivatives/source-map.md` to match.
- [ ] If I changed the confidence-label taxonomy (`confirmed`, `inferred`, `runtime-unverified`, `blocked-by-access`), I've explained why in this PR's description.
